//note: The `paths` alias resolves @galerina/ext-tmf to its SHIPPED dist during in-staging build/typecheck. Once the hub ABSORBS this package into packages-galerina/galerina-ext-secrets-tmf the workspace resolves @galerina/ext-tmf natively (sibling package) and this alias becomes a harmless fallback. The @noble argon2 import in anchor.ts uses a relative path into the compiler's vendored node_modules — same borrow pattern as ext-tmf/kemdem.ts; the hub re-points it if the absorbed layout differs.
